## Journal.JournalLibrary.addFillingJournal() method

> Warning: This API is now obsolete.
> 
> Use addJournal instead which accepts both filling recipe and confection journals
> 

Adds a filling recipe journal record to the library.

**Signature:**

```typescript
addFillingJournal(journal: IFillingRecipeJournalRecord): Result<JournalId>;
```
